'''Hover Droids''' were floating [[Battle droid/Legends|combat droids]] that were deployed at [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] before the [[Occupation of Bespin|Occupation]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Hover Droid would rotate while levitating. The Hover Droid existed alongside a [[Hover Droid (small)|smaller model]].<ref name="SEMP" />

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Hover Droids first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'', and they were later named in the strategy guide ''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]''. Hover Droids share their name with [[Hover Droid (small)|another droid]] the appears in ''Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back''.
